decisions.briefing: Market was neutral with a mild tech-versus-broad split — NASDAQ -0.5% while S&P 500 held +0.1%. Cash sits at $477, just below the $500 threshold that would trigger new position fills, so we hold pat. All six existing positions remain open and none of our held tickers appear in the screener, meaning stop-loss and profit-target automation handles exits if needed.

market_education.summary_en: Today's session reflected a quiet rotation away from technology growth stocks, with the NASDAQ slipping 0.5% while the broader S&P 500 gained a marginal 0.1%. The divergence suggests investors rotated toward value and cyclical names rather than chasing high-multiple tech. Without a strong macro catalyst, the market drifted in a narrow range with no decisive directional move.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場走勢平淡，出現輕微板塊輪動跡象。科技成長股承壓，納斯達克指數下跌0.5%，而標普500指數則小漲0.1%。此背離走勢顯示，投資者傾向將資金轉向估值較低的價值股及週期性板塊，而非追逐高估值科技股。在缺乏明確宏觀催化劑的情況下，市場整體維持窄幅盤整格局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors shift money from one part of the market to another — such as moving out of high-growth tech stocks and into value or cyclical sectors like industrials or financials. Today's split between a falling NASDAQ and a steady S&P 500 is a textbook early rotation signal. Spotting these shifts early can help you reposition your portfolio to ride the next wave rather than fight it.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者將資金從市場某一板塊轉移至另一板塊——例如減持高成長科技股，轉而增持工業股或金融股等價值型板塊。今日納斯達克下跌而標普500持穩的背離走勢，正是教科書式的輪動早期訊號。能夠及早識別此類轉變，有助於投資者主動調整持倉，順勢而非逆勢操作。
